provenance.capture_method: SYNTHETIC — NOT a captured corpus. Derived from model-y-awake.json (tesla_fleet) by (a) attaching a tesla_custom entity/device registry so detectDialect probes platform:tesla_custom, and (b) rewriting the charging-status read to the tesla_custom ASSUMPTION spelling.
provenance.assumption_notice: The tesla_custom object-id/state spellings here are the data/dialect.ts ASSUMPTION set (dialect.ts L303-315), NOT corpus ground truth. We hold no captured tesla_custom install. charging_status uses the assumed `charge_complete` override (TESLA_CUSTOM_CHARGING → complete) and the `charging`→`charging_status` alias mechanism. Tests assert the MECHANISM is applied (platform-driven detection + alias/override consulted), never that these literals are real. Fill in DATA-ONLY when a real corpus is captured.
provenance.notes: Exercises AC4 of Story 5.11: the whole card rendered against the costly distinct dialect (tesla_custom) to confirm no fleet-shaped assumptions leak into the UI. Cover/lock/aperture reads route through the dialect normalizers (Story 5.11 remediation); charge state goes through normalizeChargingState. Synthetic data only — no Tesla art/trade-dress.
